title: Sweet Jamaican Stir Fry
description: A sweet and savory twist on the classic stir fry, featuring Jamaican jerk seasoning and Nutella for added depth of flavor.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onions and bell peppers and cook until tender, 3-4 minutes.
Add the sweet potatoes and cook until slightly tender, 3-4 minutes.
Add the Jamaican stir (jerk seasoning) and cook for 1 minute.
Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until the vegetables are tender and the flavors are combined.
Serve hot, topped with Nutella and garnished with chopped green onions.
Optional: serve with rice or noodles for a filling meal.
